description: 58 - 14-01-2025 - Email from Lindsey Whyte (Director General for International, HMT) to James Roscoe (former Deputy Head of Mission, British Embassy in Washington, FCDO) and others

text:
James Roscoe (former Deputy Head of Mission, British Embassy in Washington, FCDO) and
others

From: Whyte, Lindsey - HMT

Sent: 14 January 2025 18:09

To: James Roscoe (Sensitive); Ginsberg, lan - HMT; Kantor, Suzy - HMT
Subject: intro call with Lord Mandelson

Dear all,

| had an intro call with Lord Mandelson this afternoon — a couple of quick things to feed-back.

eee

Thanks very much,

Lindsey
